name: cancel_appointment
description: Cancels an existing appointment by removing it from Google Calendar and updating the CRM record. Call this when a caller wants to cancel their booking.

booking_reference.description: The booking reference number (e.g. 'NDF-240527-001'). Use this if the caller provides it.

caller_name.description: Caller's name to help locate the booking if no reference provided.

appointment_date.description: Date of the appointment to cancel (YYYY-MM-DD format). Use if no booking reference.
